---
name: "\U0001F4A1 Feature request"
about: Suggest a new feature for Snippy.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## What do you want?

<!-- One-paragraph description of the feature. -->

## Why do you want it?

<!--
The "why" is more important than the "what" \u2014 it tells us whether to
prioritize this over the 100 other features in FEATURES.md.
If you've been bitten by the *lack* of this feature, describe the
workflow that's missing.
-->

## How do you imagine it working?

<!--
A sketch of the UI / interaction. Doesn't have to be detailed:
  - Where in the tray / palette / settings does it live?
  - Keyboard shortcut?
  - New menu item?
  - Or is it invisible (e.g. a new search operator)?
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Are there workarounds? Plugins? Other apps that do this well? -->

## Are you willing to send a PR?

<!-- Be honest \u2014 "no" is fine and we appreciate the idea regardless. -->

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to work on this
- [ ] I'd need help / pairing
- [ ] No, just an idea

## Additional context

<!--
Anything else: links to similar features in other apps, screenshots
of the workflow you're trying to fix, etc.
-->
